prompt_text:
### Demographics: 50-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 9 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia; Mild dyspepsia and bloating; Recurrent nocturnal hypoglycemia (2-4 episodes/month, self-resolved) over the last 3 months.

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
MASH
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Appendicitis (status post appendectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Glimepiride 4mg once daily; Insulin Degludec 18units once daily; Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 60.9 kg; Height 154.2 cm; BMI 25.6 kg/m²; Blood pressure 113/73 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.9%; 9 months ago 8.2%; 6 months ago 7.7%; 3 months ago 7.2%; current 6.7%), FPG (12 months ago 199mg/dL; 9 months ago 195mg/dL; 6 months ago 174mg/dL; 3 months ago 157mg/dL; current 142mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 61.2kg; 9 months ago 60.1kg; 6 months ago 60.1kg; 3 months ago 60.1kg; current 60.9kg), Height (12 months ago 154.2cm; 9 months ago 154.2cm; 6 months ago 154.2cm; 3 months ago 154.2cm; current 154.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 25.0kg/m²; current 25.6kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 113mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 69mmHg; 9 months ago 69mmHg; 6 months ago 70mmHg; 3 months ago 72mmHg; current 73mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 68U/L; 9 months ago 75U/L; 6 months ago 74U/L; 3 months ago 74U/L; current 68U/L), AST (12 months ago 120U/L; 9 months ago 116U/L; 6 months ago 110U/L; 3 months ago 109U/L; current 109U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.7mg/dL; current 0.7mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 36mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 33mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 32mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 31mL/min/1.73m²; current 33mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 90mg/g; 9 months ago 118mg/g; 6 months ago 115mg/g; 3 months ago 82mg/g; current 87mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 92mg/dL; 9 months ago 92mg/dL; 6 months ago 87mg/dL; 3 months ago 88mg/dL; current 89mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 54mg/dL; 9 months ago 54mg/dL; 6 months ago 54mg/dL; 3 months ago 54mg/dL; current 55mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 166mg/dL; 9 months ago 162mg/dL; 6 months ago 178mg/dL; 3 months ago 182mg/dL; current 173mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 10.0g/dL; 9 months ago 10.8g/dL; 6 months ago 10.1g/dL; 3 months ago 10.0g/dL; current 10.1g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
